#### Analytics & Reporting
Make informed marketing decisions with analytics and reporting that combine human analysis with AI driven data insights.

This comprehensive overview allows you to see the effectiveness of your strategies, providing actionable feedback for continuous improvement.

Leverage our advanced analytics for a deeper understanding of your performance and opportunities for growth.

Subscription


Adhering to your format and incorporating the specified details:

#### 1. Essential Package: $2,500/month
Startup Fee: $2,000 for Web Design & Development
Services Included:
Consulting, Strategy & Branding
Content Creation: 4 pieces/month, including blogs
Basic SEO & Blog Integration: 2 blog posts/month
Social Media Management: 2 platforms
PPC (Pay Per Click) Advertising Management (ad spend not included)
